description: Immerse yourself in the vibrant culture and artistic spirit of Seoul, where K-Pop reigns supreme and history whispers through the streets. This 3-day adventure is designed for couples eager to explore the heart of Korea's capital, blending the excitement of K-Pop with the rich tapestry of culture and art. From iconic landmarks to hidden gems, prepare for a journey that celebrates your love for all things Korean.

activities.description: Start your day with a delicious breakfast at a cozy café in Myeongdong, where you can enjoy Korean-style toast and fresh fruit juices. It's a great way to fuel up for a day of exploration!
Visit the grand Gyeongbokgung Palace, the largest of the Five Grand Palaces built during the Joseon Dynasty. Don't miss the changing of the guard ceremony, which takes place at the main gate!
Enjoy a hearty lunch at Tosokchon, famous for its ginseng chicken soup (samgyetang). This dish is not only delicious but also a local favorite for its health benefits.
Stroll through Bukchon Hanok Village, a picturesque area filled with traditional Korean hanoks. It's a perfect spot for photos and to experience the charm of old Seoul.
Head back to Myeongdong for some K-Pop shopping! Explore various stores selling albums, merchandise, and fan goods from your favorite idols. Don't forget to check out the themed cafes!
Explore the Dongdaemun Design Plaza, an architectural marvel that hosts exhibitions and events. The area is also great for evening strolls and has a vibrant atmosphere.

activities.activity: Dinner at a Korean BBQ Restaurant
activities.description: End your day with a delicious Korean BBQ dinner at a local restaurant. Grill your own meat and enjoy it with various side dishes (banchan) for a true Korean dining experience.
After dinner, take a leisurely walk through the Myeongdong Night Market. Sample street food, shop for late-night snacks, and soak in the lively atmosphere of this bustling area.
Start your day with a delicious breakfast at a cozy café in Hongdae, known for its vibrant atmosphere. Enjoy a classic Korean breakfast set with rice, soup, and side dishes to fuel your day ahead.

Wander through the artistic streets of Hongdae, where colorful murals and street performances create a lively ambiance. Don't forget to snap some photos with the unique art pieces that reflect the local culture.

activities.activity: Lunch at a K-Pop Themed Restaurant
activities.description: Indulge in a fun lunch at a K-Pop themed restaurant, where you can enjoy Korean dishes while surrounded by memorabilia of your favorite idols. It's a perfect spot to soak in the K-Pop culture.
Head to the iconic Dongdaemun Design Plaza, a hub for design and fashion. Explore the exhibitions and enjoy the futuristic architecture, which is a great backdrop for photos.
Dive into the world of K-Pop at the nearby shopping centers where you can find a variety of merchandise, from albums to exclusive fan goods. It's a must-visit for any K-Pop fan!
Take a leisurely walk through Insadong, known for its traditional Korean culture. Browse through art galleries, craft shops, and tea houses, and perhaps pick up some unique souvenirs.

activities.activity: Dinner at a Traditional Korean Restaurant
activities.description: End your day with a hearty dinner at a traditional Korean restaurant. Savor dishes like bulgogi or bibimbap, and enjoy the warm atmosphere that reflects Korean hospitality.

days.title: Final Day of K-Pop and Farewell

activities.description: Start your day with a cozy breakfast at a local café in Seoul, enjoying traditional Korean dishes like kimchi fried rice or a simple yet delicious toast with coffee. It's a great way to fuel up for a day of exploration!

Head to COEX Mall, a massive underground shopping complex where you can find K-Pop merchandise, including albums, posters, and exclusive fan goods. Don't miss the Starfield Library, a stunning space perfect for photos!

activities.activity: Lunch at a K-Pop Themed Café
activities.description: Enjoy lunch at a K-Pop themed café where you can indulge in cute desserts and drinks inspired by your favorite idols. It's a fun way to immerse yourself in the K-Pop culture while enjoying a meal!

Stroll through the trendy Gangnam district, famous for its upscale shops and vibrant atmosphere. Be sure to check out the K-Star Road, where you can find the Gangnamdol, a series of cute K-Pop character statues!

Make your way to Lotte World Tower, the tallest building in South Korea. Take the elevator to the observation deck for breathtaking views of the city. It's a perfect spot to reflect on your trip and take some memorable photos!

activities.activity: Dinner at a Local BBQ Restaurant
activities.description: Wrap up your trip with a delicious Korean BBQ dinner. Grill your own meat and enjoy it with a variety of side dishes. It's a must-try experience that will leave you with great memories of Korean cuisine!
Before heading back, take some time for last-minute shopping at nearby stores for K-Pop merchandise. It's the perfect way to bring a piece of your trip back home!
